text: No person shall operate a motorized scooter at a speed in excess of 15 miles per hour.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 7. Speed Laws [22348 - 22445.6]
#### Article 2. Other Speed Laws [22400 - 22413]
##### § 22411

No person shall operate a motorized scooter at a speed in excess of 15 miles per hour.

*(Added by Stats. 1999, Ch. 722, Sec. 7. Effective January 1, 2000.)*

subsections.text: No person shall operate a motorized scooter at a speed in excess of 15 miles per hour.

history.raw: (Added by Stats. 1999, Ch. 722, Sec. 7. Effective January 1, 2000.)
